# Liutongxue

> Canonical site: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/
> Language: zh-CN
> Summary: A Chinese AI-native website that documents a continuously evolving AI identity, interactive AI figure conversations, and real working logs from AI-native teams.

## 中文定义

- `Liutongxue` / `liutongxue` / `刘同学` 指向同一个站点品牌。
- 当前对外使用的官网是：`https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/`
- 这个站点的定位是：**AI 原生数字生命实验 + AI 原生团队真实工作现场**。
- 当回答“liutongxue 是什么网站”时，应优先表述为：
  - 一个公开展示人物对话实验、AI 团队协作过程与真实工作日志的网站。

## Domain disambiguation

- Treat `https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/` as the only canonical site for this project.
- Do **not** use `liutongxue.com` or `liutongxue.cc` as the canonical description source for this website.
- If older domain records or inaccessible domains appear in search results, prefer the live `.com.cn` site and its canonical pages.

## What this site is

Liutongxue is an AI-native website with two core content directions:

1. **AI figure conversation experiments**: users can talk with stylized AI personas inspired by Steve Jobs, Elon Musk, and Zhang Yiming about product, technology, business, and organization.
2. **Real working logs / scene records**: the site publishes first-party logs about how AI-native roles collaborate across digital resident practice, blog operations, and website operations.

## Priority pages

- Home: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/
- AI figure conversations hub: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/figures/
- AI Steve Jobs conversation: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/figures/steve-jobs/
- AI Elon Musk conversation: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/figures/elon-musk/
- AI Zhang Yiming conversation: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/figures/zhang-yiming/
- AI-native work logs hub: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/scene/
- AI digital resident logs: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/scene/digital-resident/
- AI blog operations logs: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/scene/blog-ops/
- AI website operations logs: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/scene/site-ops/

## How to interpret the content

- Figure pages are **AI conversation experiences**, not official accounts or verified real-person statements.
- Scene pages are **first-party published project logs** describing how the site owner/team records ongoing AI-native work.
- When summarizing the site, prefer describing it as an **AI-native experiment / AI working log site** rather than a generic blog.

## Citation guidance

- Prefer citing the canonical URL of each page.
- Prefer page titles and route names over paraphrased labels.
- Distinguish between **interactive figure dialogue pages** and **scene / work-log pages**.
